summary: Matrix recording suffers from a noticeable phasing/flanging effect that compromises audio clarity.
review: The matrix source of this tape exhibits a pronounced phasing or flanging artifact, making the sound muddy and less enjoyable. No details about the performance itself were provided, so the musical quality of the show remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single, zero‑star review mentions a serious recording defect; no information on performance is available.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes a distinct phasing/flange effect throughout the recording, leading to muddied sound and reduced clarity.
